notes: The first end-to-end detector build reached 9/10 acceptable and 7/10 preferred.

The sole miss was a false-positive handrail on a partial landing frame. Stair/landing semantic reranking was then removed because the detector did not reliably identify the true stair overviews; E5 classical selection already chose an acceptable stair frame.
The final result combines the observed detector picks for supported room types with the unchanged E5 stair fallback. No gold filenames or room-specific frame identities are used by product code.
